evals.prompt: Add EU AI Act compliance logging to my chatbot that interacts with users. It's a limited-risk system.
evals.expected_output: AIActLogger configured with transparency disclosure (Art. 50.1), synthetic content marking (Art. 50.2), and logOperation calls for each inference.
assertions: Logs operation with timestamp, systemId, inputData, outputData

evals.prompt: Review this codebase for EU AI Act compliance gaps in our high-risk credit scoring system.
evals.expected_output: Identifies missing risk management (Art. 9), data governance (Art. 10), automatic logging (Art. 12), and human oversight (Art. 14) requirements with specific remediation steps.
assertions: Confirms human oversight design is present

evals.prompt: Create an AI interaction disclosure banner for our web app per EU AI Act Article 50.
evals.expected_output: Component or middleware that discloses AI interaction at first contact, marks synthetic content, and stores disclosure timestamp in compliance logs.
assertions: Synthetic content is marked as AI-generated
Disclosure event is logged for audit trail
